blockingIssues.description: Convention parsing broken (line 1143): String slice indices incorrect - uses [3..] instead of [4..] for '- **' prefix, causing stored conventions to be unparsable. The name extraction `trimmed[3..colon_pos]` incorrectly includes the second asterisk.
Confidence calculation bug (line 955): Uses sum of all pattern frequencies instead of per-pattern frequency. `frequency_map.values().sum()` inflates confidence scores incorrectly.
Anti-pattern retrieval unimplemented (line 1175): get_anti_patterns_for_error is a stub returning empty vec - anti-patterns are extracted but cannot be retrieved.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion:
Document the convention block markdown format: '### ConventionType

- **name**: description

  - Example: `code`' - this format is used by pattern_learning and skill_extraction but never documented
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features memory-pattern-learning and memory-skill-extraction both use this format but it's reverse-engineered from parsing code

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on when parse() methods should be fallible vs return defaults - enum parsing patterns vary across codebase (some panic, some default, some return Result)
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-semantic-memory uses silent defaults in parse(), memory-confidence-bayesian uses expect(), no consistent pattern documented

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that MemoryStore trait get_by_type() and get_by_label() are not repository-scoped - this is a pre-existing design gap that workers should be aware of
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-scoping review found get_by_type/get_by_label have no repository parameter despite search() requiring repository

notes.fixFeatureNeverImplemented: The fix-memory-blocking-issues feature was never implemented. Despite round 2 synthesis identifying blocking issues in memory-pattern-learning, no fix feature was created or executed. The issues remain unfixed in the current codebase.
notes.otherFailedFeaturesStillPending: The following features with blocking issues from round 2 are still 'pending' (not completed): mem-scoping, mem-deprecation, mem-decay-function, mem-triple-stream-retrieval, mem-provenance-tracking, mem-event-log-jsonl. These cannot be reviewed until they are implemented.
notes.round3Changes: Round 3 re-reviewed all 5 completed features. memory-pattern-learning remains the only completed feature with blocking issues. All other completed features (sqlite-store, memory-blocks, recall, skill-extraction) pass review.
